site.name: A ONE

footer.tagline: Mumbai's premier luxury unisex salon. Where every visit is a bespoke journey of beauty and self-care.

home.hero_sub: Where Art Meets Elegance — Bandra, Mumbai
home.about_text1: Welcome to A One Hair Salon — Mumbai's finest unisex luxury salon. With 8+ years of artistry and an unwavering commitment to excellence, every visit is a bespoke experience crafted just for you.
home.about_text2: From precision cuts and vibrant color to rejuvenating spa treatments and flawless bridal styling, our salon is where beauty is elevated to an art form.

testimonials.text: The balayage treatment transformed my hair completely. Absolutely loved the result — the salon has a magical ambiance.
testimonials.name: Priya Sharma

testimonials.text: Best men's haircut I've ever gotten. Clean, precise, and the hot towel shave was incredibly relaxing. Worth every rupee.
testimonials.name: Rohan Mehta

testimonials.text: My bridal look was beyond perfection. The team understood exactly what I wanted. I felt like royalty on my wedding day!
testimonials.name: Ayesha Khan
